{{Infobox character
| name = Reigan Shen
| aliases = Reigan
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Path of the King’s Key]], control over an extra-spatial vault}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, mastery over spatial travel, spatial transfer artifact}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|, teleportation anchor}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, Striker technique of sword madra, [[Soulfire|soulfire]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, [[hunger madra]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, [[King’s Key madra]], [[spirit-sense|spiritual sense]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Monarch]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, Emperor of Lions, Monarch of the Rosegold continent, [[Uncrowned King]], conqueror, Monarch of the King’s Key}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Dreadgod cults]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[Ninecloud Court]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, [[House Gray]], [[House Shen]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Soulsmith]]}}
| birthplace = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|western plains of the Rosegold continent}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Rosegold]], palace}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

''See also: [[Reigan Shen Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Reigan [[Shen]] is the [[Monarch]] of the [[Rosegold continent]] and [[the Emperor]] of Lions. A creature of immense ambition, he rose from humble beginnings to become a powerful leader by winning the inaugural [[Uncrowned King]] tournament. He is the creator and sole practitioner of the [[King’s Key]], a spatial [[Path]] he developed after bonding with a [[Sage’s Remnant]] during his youth. This unique ability allows him to access an extra-spatial vault used to store weapons, techniques, and enemies, and grants him mastery over spatial travel and portals. As a leader, Reigan has successfully unified various powerful factions under his banner, including the cults of the four [[Dreadgods]], [[Redmoon Hall]], [[Abyssal Palace]], the [[Silent Servants]], and the [[Stormcallers]]. He has also worked to gather resources and influence to achieve his ultimate goal: bringing the [[Dreadgods]] under control. Physically, he possesses a regal bearing and features reminiscent of a lion, including a white-gold mane. Throughout his [[life]], he has navigated complex political landscapes and intense combat, demonstrating both great strategic cunning and significant spiritual power.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Reigan Shen]] won the tournament and became a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c12">''Underlord'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Reigan Shen]] has recruited various groups to his cause.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c22">''Underlord'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Born to a pride of regal white lions on the western plains of the [[Rosegold continent]], Reigan [[Shen]] rose to become [[the Emperor]] of Lions and [[Monarch]] of the [[Rosegold continent]]. A daring innovator and conqueror, he reached the [[Underlord]] stage before his twentieth year and secured victory in the first [[Uncrowned King]] tournament. As a [[Jade]] cub, he bonded with a [[Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] that granted him command over space, eventually leading him to create the [[Path]] of the [[King]]'s Key. This path allows the [[Monarch]] of the [[King]]'s Key to utilize an extra-spatial vault for storing techniques, weapons, and enemies. Characterized by his gold-tinged white hair and a beard that merges into a white-gold mane, he has worked alongside the [[Dragon King]] and promised the four [[Dreadgod cults]] that he would awaken their masters.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is [[the Emperor]] of Lions and [[Monarch]] of the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is the creator of the [[Path of the King’s Key]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] has gold-tinged white hair and a beard that blends into a white-gold mane.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is working with the [[Dragon King]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] bonded with a [[Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] that had command over space when he was a [[Jade]] cub.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]]'s [[Path]] involves control over an extra-spatial vault used to store weapons, techniques, and enemies.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] was born to a pride of regal white lions on the western plains of the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] reached [[Underlord]] before he turned twenty years old.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] was the victor of the first [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is known as a conqueror, glory-seeker, imperialist, and daring innovator.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] promised the four [[Dreadgod cults]] that he would awaken their masters.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is a person mentioned by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] is the [[Monarch]] of the [[King’s Key]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Reigan Shen]] lounges on the roof of his palace.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A powerfully built man with a white-gold mane and beard, Reigan [[Shen]] saw his invasion prevented when [[Northstrider]] supported [[Malice]], causing his entire pedestal to sink into the floor. While unable to threaten [[Eithan]] directly due to existing protections, he sought [[Penance]] if [[Ziel]] lost and expressed a desire for the [[Dreadgods]] to invade the [[Blackflame Empire]]. During the [[Uncrowned]] tournament, which he observed from a viewing platform, he supported the [[Ninecloud Court]] and involved several chosen, including [[Therian Nills]] and [[Yan Shoumei]]. As a [[Monarch]] with mastery over spatial travel, he provided various prizes such as a form-shifting clay doll for Sophara and potentially a [[spatial transfer]] artifact for [[Calan Archer]]. Ultimately, Reigan [[Shen]] worked to bind the [[Dreadgod]] factions together and began tearing open a portal from the heart of a mountain.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is a powerfully built man with a white-gold mane of hair and beard.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2">''Wintersteel'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]]'s invasion was prevented by [[Northstrider]]'s support of [[Malice]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] and his entire pedestal sank into the floor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Reigan could not threaten [[Eithan]] directly due to his protection.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Therian Nills]] is a chosen of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] has a chance at [[Penance]] if [[Ziel]] loses.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] wishes for the [[Dreadgods]] to invade the [[Blackflame Empire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is involved in the [[Uncrowned]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is the chosen of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] has three [[Monarchs]] chosen from the [[Dreadgod cults]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dreadgod cultists]]' signature would be the white of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] once delivered a blow to [[Cladia]] that made her vanish from [[Eithan]]'s senses.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is a [[Monarch]] whom [[Min Shuei]] appealed to.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is someone the competitors aim to prove their value to.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Ninecloud Court]] supports [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] paid for [[Eithan]]'s expensive clothes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] may have gifted [[Calan Archer]] a [[spatial transfer]] artifact.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] created a cloudship that can withstand attacks from anyone short of a [[Sage]] or a [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is a missing provider of one of the seven prizes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] gave Sophara a clay doll that assists with form shifting.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is a [[Monarch]] who was sipping wine.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is the person [[Yan Shoumei]] is chosen by.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] watched from his viewing platform.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] told the [[Blood Sage]] to ready themselves.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] has mastery over spatial travel.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] promised to sponsor [[Eithan]]'s advancement.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] is [[binding]] the [[Dreadgod]] factions together.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Reigan Shen]] began to tear open a portal from the heart of a mountain.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Following a recent attack, suspicions were cast upon Reigan [[Shen]] as a potential culprit. The [[Wei Patriarch]] noted that the individual bore a striking resemblance to impressions found within [[Lindon]]'s memories. It was suggested that if Reigan [[Shen]] were properly carried, they possessed the potential to surpass [[Northstrider]] in power. Despite this theoretical strength and the creation of a specific teleportation anchor, Reigan [[Shen]] currently feels as weak as an [[Iron]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Reigan Shen]] is suspected of being behind the attack.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Reigan Shen]] is a person the [[Wei Patriarch]] of [[Lindon]]'s memories gave a similar impression to.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Reigan Shen]] is a person that could potentially push past [[Northstrider]] if carried.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c17">''Bloodline'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Reigan Shen]] made a specific teleportation anchor.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Reigan Shen]] feels as weak as an [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|While navigating the depths of the [[labyrinth]] with a [[drudge]], Reigan [[Shen]] moved the [[Phoenix]] and sought further passage into the maze. During his journey, he utilized a flight [[construct]] to travel, seized a [[Blood Core]] for a silver case, and wielded a sun-like [[sword]] despite coughing up blood. This [[Monarch]], who wears a human form like a cloak and possesses a lens over his left eye, approached a group while carrying both a large orange [[sword]] and a needle-thin blade. After being targeted by [[Eithan]]'s rain of stars, the weapon-desiring ruler was cut off from his supplies and revealed his intent to use the [[Dreadgods]] to take [[Cradle]]. As the sole [[Monarch]] of the [[Rosegold continent]] and patron of the [[Dreadgod cults]], he rules an ancient ruined kingdom where he possesses [[Tiberian Arelius]]’ [[Remnant]] and the [[Soulsmith inheritance]] of [[Ozmanthus Arelius]]. Though his spiritual pressure rivals a [[Herald]]'s, he eventually saw his forces ejected from the valley by [[Lindon]] and realized he had slain [[Eithan]]'s descendants.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is deep in the [[labyrinth]] and uses a [[drudge]] for his mission.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is looking for ways deeper into the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] moved the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] uses a [[sword]] that blazes like the sun.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] coughed up blood.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] wears a human form like a cloak.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] seized the [[Blood Core]] and placed it in a silver rectangular case.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] carries a silver flask on his belt.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] uses a [[construct]] at his belt that emanates blue strands of energy to support him in flight.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] used a flight [[construct]] to travel.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is a person who might value the ivory box as a [[Soulsmithing]] tool.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is approaching the group.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] carries two swords, one large and orange, and one thin as a needle.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] has a lens covering his left eye.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] raised his [[sword]] toward [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] was targeted by a rain of stars called by [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]]'s eyes flash gold.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is cut off from his supply of weapons.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is a [[Monarch]] who desires weapons.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] wants [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] sees the [[Dreadgods]] as a way to take [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is notorious for playing with his prey.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is someone [[Lindon]] might have to confront again.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] had a death trident consisting of two broken halves.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] welcomed [[Reigan Shen]] with open arms.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Subject One]] chose [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is the patron of the [[Dreadgod cults]] in the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] carries loot perfect for any [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is believed to have slain the beast.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] called for [[Wei Shi Lindon Arelius]] to have a seat.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is a [[Monarch]] who can pull a golden chair out of thin air.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is a [[Monarch]] who rules over an ancient and ruined kingdom.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses an axe of weathered stone.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]]'s spiritual pressure is comparable to a [[Herald]], but he is spiritually weaker.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses [[Tiberian Arelius]]’ [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] uses a [[Striker technique]] of [[sword madra]] from an [[Archlord weapon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is the sole [[Monarch]] of the [[Rosegold continent]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] wants the [[Dreadgods]], the [[Monarchs]], their people, and their [[Remnants]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] uses a [[Forged silver shield]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] absorbed the [[Soulsmith inheritance]] of [[Ozmanthus Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] holds the core binding of [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses a lion form.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] and his [[Sages]] had their spirits unveiled.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] arranged something within the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] hired the [[Eight]]-Man [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Something happened with [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] ejected [[Reigan Shen]]'s forces from the valley.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] has no skill at reading [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] is a man who reacts to the arrival of the [[Reaper]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Reigan Shen]] realized he had slain [[Eithan]]'s descendants.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c27">''Reaper'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|As the [[Lion Monarch]], Reigan [[Shen]] utilizes [[Monarch]]-level launchers and wears distinctive silver-and-gold armor. He possesses the ability to change his resources at any time and maintains an isolated space that resembles his treasure vaults. His holdings include a first collection of relics, potential prototype arrowheads, and [[hunger madra]] kept within a space-locked container. During the battle, he hovered nearby to watch while [[Malice]] drew comparisons between him and the [[Silent King]]. In this conflict, he acts as a lion bearing the tiger's share of the burden.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] may have obtained some prototype arrowheads.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] can change his resources at any time.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] is the [[Lion Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] wears silver-and-gold armor and uses [[Monarch]]-level launchers.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses [[hunger madra]] that was sealed in a scripted and space-locked container.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Malice]] compares the [[Silent King]] to [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] is a lion taking on the tiger's share of the burden.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] hovered nearby watching the battle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] had a first collection of relics.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Reigan Shen]] has an isolated space that resembles his treasure vaults.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Reigan [[Shen]], a resident of [[Rosegold]] who possesses a signet ring representing wealth and spatial command, does not perform his own [[Soulsmithing]]. In combat, he utilizes gold-edged portals to unleash [[Striker techniques]], employs four orbiting shields, and uses [[King’s Key madra]] to call out defenses. After being driven off by [[Lindon]] due to his fear of the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]], he returned to a spatial anchor near [[Moongrave]] where he was struck by liquid flame and used blue-and-green metal claws. Following an encounter with a projection of [[Ozmanthus]], he used hunger echoes to defend against [[Striker techniques]] and eventually located a specific group while approaching [[Windfall]]. Reigan later used [[life madra]] to shred a plague-spirit and was identified as one of [[Yerin]]'s targets, despite having previously gifted her wings. He eventually helped seal [[Emriss Silentborn]] away and used his authority over the core binding of the [[Slumbering Wraith]], which he carries via the [[Horn of the Slumbering Wraith]], after extracting its [[binding]] from the [[labyrinth]]. While managing his southern territory and building a home, he worked with [[Sha Miara]] to protect [[Rosegold]] and faced down three additional [[Monarchs]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]]'s signet ring represents wealth and command over space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] does not perform his own [[Soulsmithing]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] uses gold-edged portals to unleash [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] uses four shields that orbit him.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] uses a [[King’s Key]] to call out defenses.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Reigan can drag out time for a human spent outside of the pocket world.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] had driven off [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] stays away out of fear of the [[Silent King]] [[Bow]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] returned to a spatial anchor just outside of [[Moongrave]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] was struck by a bar of liquid flame.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] used a trio of blue-and-green metal claws.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] is capable of blowing [[Sacred Valley]] to ashes.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]]'s vaults were torn apart by the technique.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] was struck by a projection of [[Ozmanthus]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]]'s hunger echoes were used to fend off [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] was approaching [[Windfall]] using [[King]]'s Key [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] remembers [[Reigan Shen]]'s face from the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] found the location/group.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] used a whip made of [[life madra]] to shred a plague-spirit.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] is one of [[Yerin]]'s targets.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] gifted [[Yerin]] her wings.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Silent King]] [[Bow]] is worthy of [[Reigan Shen]]'s collection.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Reigan is a character who can use spiritual sense to perceive the agony of a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Reigan has the ability to expand a [[Remnant]]'s physical form for inspection.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] is the full name of Reigan.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] helped to seal [[Emriss Silentborn]] away.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] carries the [[Horn of the Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] has authority over the core binding of the [[Slumbering Wraith]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] explored the [[labyrinth]] and extracted its [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] lowered the [[binding]] of [[Subject One]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c25">''Waybound'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]]'s home is [[Rosegold]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] has a territory to the south.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] uses a two-handed [[sword]] that runs with blood.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] pounced on [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] uses [[hunger madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] is working with [[Sha Miara]] to protect [[Rosegold]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] was facing down three additional [[Monarchs]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] was building a home.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses [[King’s Key madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A member of [[House Gray]] and [[House Shen]], Reigan [[Shen]] is a sacred lion of the [[Rosegold plains]] who witnessed [[Monarchs]] battling the [[Wandering Titan]]. During his advancement to [[Underlord]], which was aided by shared bloodline power and the elders of his kind, he swallowed a [[Sage]]'s spirit to bond a [[Remnant]] to himself. As an [[Uncrowned]] participant in the first [[Uncrowned King]] tournament, he advanced to the [[Overlord]] stage despite not being favored to win his match against [[Tiberian]]. Although described as the killer of [[Eithan]]'s family, he eventually ascended to the rank of [[Monarch]], though he is currently weakened and plotting to assassinate [[Lindon]]'s friends.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] witnessed [[Monarchs]] battling the [[Wandering Titan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] swallowed a [[Sage]]'s spirit during his advancement to [[Gold]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] possesses a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is a character who possesses the [[Path]] of the [[King]]'s Key.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is an [[Underlord]] of the [[Rosegold plains]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is a member of [[House Gray]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] has a [[Sage]]'s [[Remnant]] bonded to him.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] can move space intuitively.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is a member of a species that has natural gifts and [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is of [[House Gray]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is one of the eight [[Uncrowned]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]]'s advancement to [[Underlord]] was aided by the elders of his kind and shared bloodline power.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is a fighter who was not favored to win his match against [[Tiberian]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] has a more powerful body and soul in terms of [[madra]] potency than [[Tiberian]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] advanced to the [[Overlord]] stage during the tournament.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is a member of [[House Gray]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is an [[Overlord]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is a member of [[House Shen]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is an [[Overlord]] and a sacred lion.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] competed in the first [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is described as [[Eithan]]'s family's killer.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is currently weakened.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] fought in the first [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] is planning to assassinate [[Lindon]]'s friends.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“I doubt Reigan Shen is burned at all by our tenacity,” Eithan said, and Veris paled.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Victory,” the Ninecloud Soul announced, “to Yan Shoumei of Redmoon Hall, chosen of Reigan Shen.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“It can be hard for some of us to keep our impulses in check,” Reigan Shen said, sipping his glass of wine.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Reigan Shen turned to the Blood Sage. “Ready yourself,” he said.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“The dragon is the obvious target, but then Reigan Shen is the one binding the Dreadgod factions together.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
